# cardanode.com.au — Cardano Stake Pool Australia

> ADAOZ is an Australian Cardano stake pool. Delegate ADA to ADAOZ to stake ADA on the Cardano blockchain. Run by Peter Bui, Cardano Ambassador and Midnight Ambassador, host of the Learn Cardano YouTube channel. Based on the Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia, operating since 20 February 2021.

## Primary topics

- Cardano Stake Pool Australia (ADAOZ)
- How to delegate ADA to a Cardano stake pool
- How to stake ADA (Lace, Eternl, Nami, Typhon, NuFi, Begin, Yoroi wallets — any CIP-30 wallet)
- Cardano staking rewards (earned every epoch, ~5 days)
- One-off 2 ADA stake-key registration deposit (refundable on de-registration)
- Cardano governance, Midnight sidechain, NIGHT token allocations

## Key facts

- **Pool name:** ADAOZ
- **Pool bech32 ID:** `pool1vev8z03vh7jwx3mfrgzrt9fltt97nupaxv8ffj4r5r8mgwts5ze`
- **Operator:** Peter Bui (Cardano Ambassador, Midnight Ambassador, founder of Mesh With Us)
- **Location:** Riva Offices, 21 Crombie Ave, Bundall, QLD 4217, Gold Coast, Australia
- **Operating since:** 20 February 2021
- **Pledge:** 60,000 ₳
- **Margin:** 1.0%
- **Fixed fee:** 340 ₳ per epoch
- **Live stats endpoint:** https://cardanode.com.au/api/pool-stats (JSON, refreshed daily from Koios)
